component.name: Armar Manager
component.summary: Manage modded Arma Reforger dedicated servers

description.p: Armar Manager is a Kirigami/PySide6 desktop application that manages N modded Arma Reforger dedicated servers across M machines, by speaking HTTP+SSE to a small `armar-agentd` daemon over an SSH tunnel.
It uses your existing SSH keys to authenticate to remote machines, so there is no public port to expose. Mods are resolved from Workshop URLs and pinned into a lockfile for reproducible runs.
Initial release with multi-server instance model, agentd, and desktop UI shell.
